# Registry Stack identifier resolver

Canonical host: https://id.registrystack.org/

This host resolves stable Registry Stack identifiers for problem types, JSON-LD namespaces, JSON Schemas, JSON-LD contexts, and SHACL shapes.

Authority boundary: This site identifies stable Registry Stack identifiers and links to public documentation. Product documentation, published schemas, and the actual service response remain authoritative for runtime behavior.

For RFC 9457 problem responses, use the stable code extension and the response status/detail fields. Do not parse URL paths for program logic.

Machine catalogs:

- https://id.registrystack.org/index.json
- https://id.registrystack.org/problems/index.json

Public documentation:

- https://docs.registrystack.org/
- https://docs.registrystack.org/reference/errors/
- https://docs.registrystack.org/llms.txt
- https://docs.registrystack.org/llms-full.txt
